ground_truth.title: Legal Aid - Nevada 211
ground_truth.main_content:
Nevada 211 services that provide low-cost and/or free legal aid for people who need counseling in legal matters, such as bankruptcy, housing, public benefits, family law, elder law or immigration/naturalization.

Website visitors using an Edge browser may be unable to see some resources. Use Chrome, Safari, Firefox, or a different browser instead.

Search Using Zip Code:
Searching with your zip code is the best way to find services in your area.

Search Using County and City:
You can also search by county and city, but the results may not be as accurate as using a zip code.

Start a New Search:
Enter keyword(s) in the box below and click "Search" to start a new, unrelated search.

Ready to search
Use the filters on the left to find resources

without: Nevada 211, a program of the Nevada Department of Health and Human Services, is committed to helping Nevadans connect with the services they need.
